DECLARATION OF JON T. KING IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100106502) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BACHAR, JOEL ON BEHALF OF THEMSELVES AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED ZIMMERMAN, MELISSA ON BEHALF OF THEMSELVES AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS JOEL BACHAR AND MELISSA ZIMMERMAN'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE NEXT MOTION (WHICH SHOULD NOT RELY ON DOCUMENTS FILED IN CONNECTION WITH THIS MOTION, BUT RATHER SHOULD BE COMPLETE) SHOULD BE NOTICED BEFORE JUDGE KARNOW IN DEPT. 611, AFTER CONTACTING HIS CLERK FOR A HEARING DATE. AFTER PRELIMINARY APPROVAL, THE FINAL HEARING WILL ALSO BE BEFORE JUDGE KARNOW IN DEPT. 611. PAPER COURTESY COPIES MUST BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 611. [SEE WORD MINUTES FOR DETAILS]. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CURTIS E KARNOW, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/CEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2020 Continued To Feb-03-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS JOEL BACHAR and MELISSA ZIMMERMAN's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

The motion is denied without prejudice. The next motion (which should not rely on documents filed in connection with this motion, but rather should be complete) should be noticed before Judge Karnow in Dept. 611, after contacting his clerk for a hearing date. After preliminary approval, the final hearing will also be before Judge Karnow in Dept. 611. Paper courtesy copies must be delivered to Dept. 611.

[see word minutes for details]

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Curtis E Karnow, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/CEK)
